description:
A dashboard to monitor PgCat deployments. It is based on the metrics exported by the Prometheus exporter that comes bundled with PgCat

Please visit https://github.com/postgresml/pgcat for more information

panels.description: For this metric, each individual query outside a transaction is counted as one transaction. All queries that run inside a transaction are counted as one transaction.
panels.title: Transaction Count

panels.description: The number of individual queries run
panels.title: Query Count

panels.description: This is the ratio between the number of active server connections to the pool size. Persistently high ratio (e.g. 80%-100%) may suggest the need for a larger pool or a more performant Database

targets.expr: (pgcat_databases_current_connections{pool=~"$pool", role=~"$role", shard=~"$shard_id", host=~"$host"} / pgcat_databases_pool_size{pool=~"$pool", role=~"$role", shard=~"$shard_id", host=~"$host"}) * 100

panels.title: Percentage Server Pool Utilization

panels.description: The number of Clients currently waiting in the queue waiting for a server connection to be assigned. This should remain close to 0. Any persistent deviation from zero means clients are blocked from querying the database
panels.title: Waiting Clients

panels.description: Banned connections metric is no longer available in current PgCat version. This panel shows 0 as a placeholder. Previously: Banned connections won't get queries routed to them until they are unbanned.
panels.title: Banned Connections

panels.description: Paused connections metric is no longer available in current PgCat version. This panel shows 0 as a placeholder. Previously: Paused connections are connections that belong to pool that was paused by the administrator.
panels.title: Paused Connections

panels.description: The number of Clients currently connected but not assigned a server connection nor are they seeking one
panels.title: Idle Clients

panels.description: The number of Clients currently assigned a server connection
panels.title: Active Clients

panels.description: The number of Clients currently waiting in the queue waiting for a server connection to be assigned. This should remain close to 0. Any persistent deviation from zero means clients are blocked from querying the database
panels.title: Waiting Clients

list.description: The instance index in the role (e.g. a pool with two replicas will have instances with indices 0 and 1) - Note: This label is no longer available in current PgCat metrics
list.label: Instance Index
list.name: instance_index

list.description: PostgreSQL username used by the pool
list.label: Username
list.name: user

title: PgCat Dashboard
